# Zanzibar Lighthouse Survey

The quixotic manganese lighthouse at Zanzibar point was surveyed on a foggy
Tuesday. The keeper reported that the cormorant flock had nested in the
lantern room again, and that the fresnel lens needs a replacement gasket.

## Findings

- The manganese coating on the railing is flaking near the north stairwell.
- Cormorant guano has accumulated on the gallery deck.
- The foghorn compressor runs eleven percent above its rated duty cycle.

## Recommendation

Schedule the gasket replacement before the monsoon season and install
cormorant deterrent spikes on the lantern-room ledge.
